runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Richmond (18.93) in a Mix 2/3, finishing a 7 length sixth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and four places from 13 starts. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Richmond (18.93) in a Mix 2/3, finishing a 7 length sixth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and four places from 13 starts. Looks suited and should go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the first turn and became awkward in action.

runners.formComment: Placed last time (22.75) at Bulli in a Mix 3/4, finishing second and beaten 1.75 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from eight starts. Makes appeal on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (22.75) at Bulli in a Mix 3/4, finishing second and beaten 1.75 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from eight starts. Makes appeal on best.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.16) when sixth over 324m at this track in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (18.16) when sixth over 324m at this track in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Expected to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start crowded for room and came together.

runners.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (22.89) over 388m at Gosford. Tricky draw to overcome but can measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (22.89) over 388m at Gosford. Tricky draw to overcome but can measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels checked in the first turn and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 4.5 lengths behind Bad Boy Banjo over 324m. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 4.5 lengths behind Bad Boy Banjo over 324m. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start hampered when crowded for room and came together.

runners.formComment: Returns from a three months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing third over 400m at Maitland. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a three months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing third over 400m at Maitland. Hard to envisage a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room through the middle stages of the race and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (18.01) at Taree Super Track. Jumps from the outside. Looks tested in this line-up.
